message:
fix(core): use XDG-compliant paths for model cache

Updates getDefaultCachePath() in semantic search to follow XDG Base
Directory Specification and platform conventions:

- Linux: XDG_CACHE_HOME/jfp/models or ~/.cache/jfp/models
- macOS: ~/Library/Caches/jfp/models
- Windows: LOCALAPPDATA/jfp/models

Previously hardcoded to ~/.config/jfp/models on all platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
